title: Tangent Beanie — “Smells Like Harry”
collection: Harry’s Room — The Harry Leary Collection
description: A worn Tangent beanie retained as a personal-material record. The supplied collection title includes the sensory and intimate note “Smells like Harry,” preserving the curator’s original description.
provenance_summary: Presented as part of the Harry Leary Collection; acquisition detail was not supplied in this source package.
qualifications: “Smells like Harry” is preserved as the collection’s descriptive wording, not presented as an independently verifiable material finding.
